title: RAND Health
description: RAND Health strengthens health care systems and the societal conditions that support health.
text:
The effects of the [OBBBA] law on Medicaid budgets and enrollment are substantial, but will vary widely across states, and in some cases may be at least partially offset by savings to the state general fund.
Preethi Rao
Senior Economist
Source: RAND News Release
I would not be surprised to see more states changing their approach to psilocybin in the coming years. But whether public opinion and public policy on psilocybin will follow a similar trajectory to cannabis—that remains to be seen.
Beau Kilmer
Codirector, RAND Drug Policy Research Center
Source: RAND News Release
